Metadata.title: Standard Site Hub
Metadata.description: Manage your standard sites and articles

Index.title: Standard Site Hub
Index.description: Seamlessly publish and manage your existing blog content as an AT Protocol Standard Site.
Index.login_error_message: Failed to login. Please check your handle.

Publications.title: Sites
Publications.verified_tooltip: This site's domain ownership has been verified via AT-URI
Publications.unverified_tooltip: This site's domain has not been verified yet
Publications.verification_instruction: Place an AT-URI file at the following URL:
Publications.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this site? This action cannot be undone.
Publications.verification_step_text: Add a /.well-known/site.standard.publication endpoint to your domain. The response should be the AT-URI of your publication record.
Publications.verification_confirmation_text: This confirms the link between the publication and the domain.

EditSite.title: Edit Site
EditSite.name: Name
EditSite.icon_exists: An icon already exists. Select a new file to replace it.
EditSite.show_in_discover_description: When enabled, this site will appear in discovery feeds
EditSite.validation_name_max: Name must be 5000 characters or less
EditSite.validation_description_max: Description must be 30000 characters or less
EditSite.fetch_ogp_failed_message: Failed to fetch OGP info or no info found. Please enter manually.

NewSite.title: Create New Site
NewSite.name: Name
NewSite.show_in_discover_description: When enabled, this site will appear in discovery feeds
NewSite.rkey_description: Lowercase alphanumeric only, up to 15 characters
NewSite.validation_name_max: Name must be 5000 characters or less
NewSite.validation_description_max: Description must be 30000 characters or less
NewSite.validation_rkey_format: Only lowercase letters and numbers are allowed
NewSite.validation_url_path: URL must not contain a path
NewSite.fetch_ogp_failed_message: Failed to fetch OGP info or no info found. Please enter manually.

SiteDetail.delete_article_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this article? This action cannot be undone.
SiteDetail.verified_site_tooltip: This site's domain ownership has been verified via AT-URI

NewArticle.title: Create New Article
NewArticle.rkey_description: Record Key (parsed from link tag or generated)
NewArticle.partially_verified_note: Successfully fetched page information, but SSH protocol verification is incomplete. You can still proceed with creation.
NewArticle.create_error_message: An error occurred while creating the article.
NewArticle.update_error_message: An error occurred while updating the article.

EditArticle.title: Edit Article
EditArticle.cover_image_placeholder: Select a new image to replace (max 1MB)
